scores.notes: The response describes what the charm does accurately — observes relation_joined and relation_changed, writes socket.getfqdn() to relation.data[self.unit]['endpoint'], and declares the endpoint in charmcraft.yaml under provides. However, the actual src/charm.py code is never shown (only described), so correctness of imports, class definition, and ops.main() cannot be verified. The approach described is idiomatic and hallucination-free; observing both relation_joined and relation_changed is slightly over-engineered but acceptable.
